data.title: Aggregate sprint-turn benchmark script (≥60% wall-clock reduction assertion)
data.description:
## Task

Write `tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh` — the aggregate /dso:sprint-turn benchmark that asserts ≥60% wall-clock reduction vs pre-refactor baseline.

### Script Behavior

1. Script a representative sprint-turn workload: 20–40 ticket CLI calls with ~50% read/write mix:
   - Reads: ticket show (×8), ticket list (×2)
   - Writes: ticket comment (×4), ticket transition (×2), ticket tag (×2), ticket create (×2)
   - Total: ~20 calls baseline; scale to 40 by doubling read batch

2. Measure total wall-clock time via `time` or `date +%s%N` before/after

3. Compare to pre-refactor baseline from `tests/perf/a0-baseline.json` aggregate field:
   - If `aggregate_sprint_turn_s` present in baseline: fail if reduction < 60%
   - If absent: print CALIBRATION_NEEDED and exit 0 (first run populates the field)

4. Print summary:
   ```
   Pre-refactor aggregate: X.XXs
   Post-refactor aggregate: Y.YYs
   Reduction: ZZ.Z% [PASS/FAIL]
   ```

5. Output JSON compatible with closing comment format on epic

### Testing Mode

GREEN — asserts ≥60% reduction after ticket-lib-api.sh is implemented.

## File Impact

- tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh (CREATE)
- tests/perf/a0-baseline.json (UPDATE — add aggregate_sprint_turn_s field when run pre-refactor)

## Acceptance

- Script is executable
- Prints clear pass/fail output
- Exits 0 when reduction ≥ 60%, exits 1 when regression detected
